name: IMA Studio TTS
tagline: Text-to-speech, TTS, voice synthesis — seed-tts-2.0 via IMA Open API.
description: TTS (text-to-speech) via IMA Open API with seed-tts-2.0. Voice synthesis, speech from text, dubbing, audio content creation. Output: audio URL (mp3/wav). Flow: query products, create task, poll until done. Requires IMA_API_KEY.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent only to https://api.imastudio.com. Obtain keys at https://imastudio.com or https://www.imaclaw.ai/ (same provider). Use a scoped or test key if concerned about credential exposure.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

key_features: IMA flow: query products, create task, poll until done
